originalEmail.description: The original cold email provided by the user.
originalEmail.title: Original Email

improvedEmail.description: The email rewritten by Stech AI with a warmer, more honest tone.
improvedEmail.title: Improved Email

status.description: The success or failure status of the processing (e.g., 'success' or 'error').
status.title: Status

timestamp.description: The processing timestamp in ISO 8601 format.
timestamp.title: Timestamp

auditHash.description: SHA-256 hash of originalEmail + improvedEmail + timestamp for audit trail and EU AI Act compliance.
auditHash.title: Audit Hash

download_docx.description: URL to download the improved email as a Microsoft Word (.docx) file.
download_docx.title: Download DOCX

download_pdf.description: URL to download the improved email as a PDF file.
download_pdf.title: Download PDF
